ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Proof Of The Transfer Of The Proceeding
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO MARIN COUNTY
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-03-284452 Conservatorship of Charles Moseley Dant,
PTR-08-290993 The Charles Molseley Dant Living Trust and PTR-12-296232 The Charles Moseley Dant Trust.

Appearances: Steven Luzaich appeared by telephone for Edith Tobin (Petitioner).

Mr. Luzaich stated that the interest of justice weighs on moving all cases to Marin, that the two Trusts are holding Conservatorship assets and that the Conservatorship Court will have to look at those assets. All three Petitions to Transfer to Marin County are taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond For The Trustee In The Trust Matter Where The Assets Are Being Transferred
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Sale Of Trust Assets For Estate Planning Purposes
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Luzaich for Edith Tobin (Petitioner). Cary Collins (Financial Advisor/CPA) also present.

Mr. Luzaich stated that the supplement to the petition was prepared to be filed today and provided it to the Court. The Court stated that it seems like a creative approach to the problem. Mr. Luzaich stated that the note complies with all IRS regulations. The Petition for Approval of Sale of Trust Assets for Estate Planning Purposes was granted (subject to review of the order and filing of the supplement). Status on filing of bond for the Trustee in the Trust matter where the assets are being transferred was set for November 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
